PD002.summary: `inplace=True` should be avoided; it has inconsistent behavior

PD003.summary: `.isna` is preferred to `.isnull`; functionality is equivalent

PD004.summary: `.notna` is preferred to `.notnull`; functionality is equivalent

PD007.summary: `.ix` is deprecated; use more explicit `.loc` or `.iloc`

PD008.summary: Use `.loc` instead of `.at`. If speed is important, use NumPy.

PD009.summary: Use `.iloc` instead of `.iat`. If speed is important, use NumPy.

PD010.summary: `.pivot_table` is preferred to `.pivot` or `.unstack`; provides same functionality

PD012.summary: Use `.read_csv` instead of `.read_table` to read CSV files

PD013.summary: `.melt` is preferred to `.stack`; provides same functionality

PD015.summary: Use `.merge` method instead of `pd.merge` function. They have equivalent functionality.

PD101.summary: Using `series.nunique()` for checking that a series is constant is inefficient

PD901.summary: Avoid using the generic variable name `df` for DataFrames

PERF101.summary: Do not cast an iterable to `list` before iterating over it

PERF102.summary: When using only the {subset} of a dict use the `{subset}()` method

PERF203.summary: `try`-`except` within a loop incurs performance overhead

PERF401.summary: Use {message_str} to create a transformed list

PERF402.summary: Use `list` or `list.copy` to create a copy of a list

PERF403.summary: Use a dictionary comprehension instead of {modifier} for-loop

PGH003.summary: Use specific rule codes when ignoring type issues

PGH004.summary: Use specific rule codes when using `noqa`

PIE794.summary: Class field `{name}` is defined multiple times

PLC0105.summary: `{kind}` name "{param_name}" does not reflect its {variance}; consider renaming it to "{replacement_name}"

PLC0131.summary: `{kind}` cannot be both covariant and contravariant

PLC0132.summary: `{kind}` name `{param_name}` does not match assigned variable name `{var_name}`

PLC0205.summary: Class `__slots__` should be a non-string iterable

PLC0206.summary: Extracting value from dictionary without calling `.items()`

PLC0207.summary: String is split more times than necessary

PLC0208.summary: Use a sequence type instead of a `set` when iterating over values

PLC0414.summary: Import alias does not rename original package

PLC0415.summary: `import` should be at the top-level of a file

PLC1901.summary: `{existing}` can be simplified to `{replacement}` as an empty string is falsey

PLC2403.summary: Module alias `{name}` contains a non-ASCII character

PLC2701.summary: Private name import `{name}` from external module `{module}`

PLC3002.summary: Lambda expression called directly. Execute the expression inline instead.

PLE0118.summary: Name `{name}` is used prior to global declaration on {row}

PLE0237.summary: Attribute `{name}` is not defined in class's `__slots__`

PLE0303.summary: `__len__` does not return a non-negative integer

PLE0604.summary: Invalid object in `__all__`, must contain only strings

PLE0605.summary: Invalid format for `__all__`, must be `tuple` or `list`

PLE0704.summary: Bare `raise` statement is not inside an exception handler

PLE1141.summary: Unpacking a dictionary in iteration without calling `.items()`

PLE1142.summary: `await` should be used within an async function

PLE1205.summary: Too many arguments for `logging` format string

PLE1206.summary: Not enough arguments for `logging` format string

PLE1307.summary: Format type does not match argument type

PLE1310.summary: String `{strip}` call contains duplicate characters (did you mean `{removal}`?)

PLE1507.summary: Invalid type for initial `os.getenv` argument; expected `str`

PLE1519.summary: `@singledispatch` decorator should not be used on methods

PLE1520.summary: `@singledispatchmethod` decorator should not be used on non-method functions

PLE1700.summary: `yield from` statement in async function; use `async for` instead

PLE2502.summary: Contains control characters that can permit obfuscated code

PLE2510.summary: Invalid unescaped character backspace, use "\b" instead

PLE2512.summary: Invalid unescaped character SUB, use "\x1a" instead

PLE2513.summary: Invalid unescaped character ESC, use "\x1b" instead

PLE2514.summary: Invalid unescaped character NUL, use "\0" instead

PLE2515.summary: Invalid unescaped character zero-width-space, use "\u200B" instead

PLE4703.summary: Iterated set `{name}` is modified within the `for` loop

PLR0124.summary: Name compared with itself, consider replacing `{actual}`

PLR0133.summary: Two constants compared in a comparison, consider replacing `{left_constant} {op} {right_constant}`

PLR0206.summary: Cannot have defined parameters for properties

PLR0402.summary: Use `from {module} import {name}` in lieu of alias

PLR0913.summary: Too many arguments in function definition ({c_args} > {max_args})

PLR1704.summary: Redefining argument with the local name `{name}`

PLR1711.summary: Useless `return` statement at end of function

PLR1714.summary: Consider merging multiple comparisons: `{expression}`. Use a `set` if the elements are hashable.

PLR1716.summary: Contains chained boolean comparison that can be simplified

PLR1733.summary: Unnecessary lookup of dictionary value by key

PLR2004.summary: Magic value used in comparison, consider replacing `{value}` with a constant variable

PLR5501.summary: Use `elif` instead of `else` then `if`, to reduce indentation

PLR6104.summary: Use `{operator}` to perform an augmented assignment directly

PLR6201.summary: Use a set literal when testing for membership

PLR6301.summary: Method `{method_name}` could be a function, class method, or static method

PLW0108.summary: Lambda may be unnecessary; consider inlining inner function

PLW0120.summary: `else` clause on loop without a `break` statement; remove the `else` and dedent its contents

PLW0129.summary: Asserting on an empty string literal will never pass

PLW0177.summary: Comparing against a NaN value; use `math.isnan` instead

PLW0211.summary: First argument of a static method should not be named `{argument_name}`

PLW0602.summary: Using global for `{name}` but no assignment is done

PLW0603.summary: Using the global statement to update `{name}` is discouraged

PLW0711.summary: Exception to catch is the result of a binary `and` operation

PLW1501.summary: `{mode}` is not a valid mode for `open`

PLW1508.summary: Invalid type for environment variable default; expected `str` or `None`

PLW1509.summary: `preexec_fn` argument is unsafe when using threads

PLW1514.summary: `{function_name}` in text mode without explicit `encoding` argument

PLW2101.summary: Threading lock directly created in `with` statement has no effect

PLW2901.summary: Outer {outer_kind} variable `{name}` overwritten by inner {inner_kind} target

PLW3201.summary: Dunder method `{name}` has no special meaning in Python 3

PT002.summary: Configuration for fixture `{function}` specified via positional args, use kwargs

PT004.summary: Fixture `{function}` does not return anything, add leading underscore

PT005.summary: Fixture `{function}` returns a value, remove leading underscore

PT006.summary: Wrong type passed to first argument of `pytest.mark.parametrize`; expected {expected_string}

PT007.summary: Wrong values type in `pytest.mark.parametrize` expected `{values}` of `{row}`

PT009.summary: Use a regular `assert` instead of unittest-style `{assertion}`

PT011.summary: `pytest.raises({exception})` is too broad, set the `match` parameter or use a more specific exception

PT012.summary: `pytest.raises()` block should contain a single simple statement

PT013.summary: Incorrect import of `pytest`; use `import pytest` instead

PT014.summary: Duplicate of test case at index {index} in `pytest.mark.parametrize`

PT017.summary: Found assertion on exception `{name}` in `except` block, use `pytest.raises()` instead

PT018.summary: Assertion should be broken down into multiple parts

PT019.summary: Fixture `{name}` without value is injected as parameter, use `@pytest.mark.usefixtures` instead

PT022.summary: No teardown in fixture `{name}`, use `return` instead of `yield`

PT028.summary: Test function parameter `{}` has default argument

PT030.summary: `pytest.warns({warning})` is too broad, set the `match` parameter or use a more specific warning

PT031.summary: `pytest.warns()` block should contain a single simple statement

PTH118.summary: `os.{module}.join()` should be replaced by `Path` with `/` operator

PTH124.summary: `py.path` is in maintenance mode, use `pathlib` instead

PTH201.summary: Do not pass the current directory explicitly to `Path`

PYI001.summary: Name of private `{kind}` must start with `_`

PYI002.summary: `if` test must be a simple comparison against `sys.platform` or `sys.version_info`

PYI004.summary: Version comparison must use only major and minor version

PYI005.summary: Version comparison must be against a length-{expected_length} tuple

PYI011.summary: Only simple default values allowed for typed arguments

PYI013.summary: Non-empty class body must not contain `...`

PYI014.summary: Only simple default values allowed for arguments

PYI015.summary: Only simple default values allowed for assignments

PYI017.summary: Stubs should not contain assignments to attributes or multiple targets

PYI020.summary: Quoted annotations should not be included in stubs

PYI021.summary: Docstrings should not be included in stubs

PYI025.summary: Use `from collections.abc import Set as AbstractSet` to avoid confusion with the `set` builtin

PYI026.summary: Use `{module}.TypeAlias` for type alias, e.g., `{name}: TypeAlias = {value}`

PYI029.summary: Defining `{name}` in a stub is almost always redundant

PYI030.summary: Multiple literal members in a union. Use a single literal, e.g. `Literal[{}]`

PYI032.summary: Prefer `object` to `Any` for the second parameter to `{method_name}`

PYI033.summary: Don't use type comments in stub file

PYI035.summary: `{name}` in a stub file must have a value, as it has the same semantics as `{name}` at runtime

PYI036.summary: Star-args in `{method_name}` should be annotated with `object`

PYI043.summary: Private type alias `{name}` should not be suffixed with `T` (the `T` suffix implies that an object is a `TypeVar`)

PYI044.summary: `from __future__ import annotations` has no effect in stub files, since type checkers automatically treat stubs as having those semantics

PYI045.summary: `__aiter__` methods should return an `AsyncIterator`, not an `AsyncIterable`

PYI048.summary: Function body must contain exactly one statement

PYI051.summary: `Literal[{literal}]` is redundant in a union with `{builtin_type}`

PYI053.summary: String and bytes literals longer than 50 characters are not permitted

PYI054.summary: Numeric literals with a string representation longer than ten characters are not permitted

PYI055.summary: Multiple `type` members in a union. Combine them into one, e.g., `type[{union_str}]`.

PYI056.summary: Calling `.{name}()` on `__all__` may not be supported by all type checkers (use `+=` instead)

PYI057.summary: Do not use `{origin}.ByteString`, which has unclear semantics and is deprecated

PYI058.summary: Use `{return_type}` as the return value for simple `{method}` methods

PYI059.summary: `Generic[]` should always be the last base class

PYI063.summary: Use PEP 570 syntax for positional-only parameters

PYI064.summary: `Final[Literal[{literal}]]` can be replaced with a bare `Final`

PYI066.summary: Put branches for newer Python versions first when branching on `sys.version_info` comparisons
